data.name: 整個小鎮都是我的受孕后宮！
data.detailed_description:
故事梗概：[/h2］你本以為作為著名的 "天羽家族 "的一個旁系家族成員也能夠得到一些好處，但你唯一的好處就是背上了 "骯髒的小色狼 "的惡名！在過去的 6 個月裡，你一直被困在一所男生寄宿學校裡，作為一種懲罰，把你改造成符合家族身份的受人尊敬的社會成員。你之所以被允許回到家鄉，是因為你的祖父，也就是家族的族長去世了，他的遺囑將會被公佈。

回到你的老家，在受到鎮上可愛的女士們不那麼熱情的歡迎之後，你的心裡七上八下。你受到了新的實際掌權者--一個叫瑪麗亞的女人--冷若冰霜的接待。她只是遞給你一部手機和一張回那鬼地方寄宿學校的車票，說你祖父的遺囑就在手機裡，你看完就可以走了。你震驚又困惑地打開手機，閱讀上面的內容： "家族中任何一個有生育能力的男人都必須馬上出去繁衍後代！在這個鎮上的任何地點，任何時間都可以。無一例外。" 你還沒來得及記住這句話，手機的輔助功能就啟動了！

*點擊！
[進入鎮上的網絡 向全體市民發送緊急警報]
*...*
[所有有生育能力的女性 如果想留在鎮上 就必須遵守這條信息] 請立即準備做愛 擁有這部手機的成員是目前鎮上最重要的人物。他的話就是法律。沒得商量]。
*Ping~*

我靠...... 來自鎮上最大決策者的簽名確認了這是一條合法的信息。伴隨著廣播，就這樣，你的生活天翻地覆，現在，擺在你面前的是一個自助餐，菜單上有鎮上所有的娘們！

。
這個自戀辣妹裡紗擁有火辣身材，可肆意地罵人。暴露衣衫之下是完美身材，她渴望吸引一批狂熱粉絲。但你很快就會讓她的一切為你所用。

。
嬌小甜美的偶像螢正在鎮上巡迴演出！說話輕聲細語，好像缺乏自信， 但這只是她害羞的幌子。她習慣於躲在後面操縱別人。這種情況不會持續太久。只要你掌控了整個城鎮，她也只能成為你完美的玩物。

。
痴迷武術的小妞美冬從小就毆打你，不遺餘力地教你做人。換一種更好的方法利用她健美的身體，這次真的教她做人！


麻沙美，一個獻身於神的女人。嚴格而直率，她總是非常討厭你。她那種神聖的態度讓她成為你的首選。成為她所崇拜的新神！她受到的恩典將是一個漫長、汗流浹背、凌亂的過程……


螢的經紀人麗是個自大的女人，從小就欺負你，在別人面前羞辱你。但多虧了祖父的意願，情況發生了逆轉，你會非常享受親自反攻回去的樂趣。


麻里亞是天羽鎮上自信而有決斷力的鎮長，凡事都要經她首肯。這位年長的女士以為她可以任意驅使你，但根據你祖父的意願，她會漸漸明白你無論是在生活中還是床上都會是那個掌權的人。

特點：

  • 日本原版視覺小說的翻譯版
  • 每個可性交的女孩都有原版日語對白配音
  • 原畫高清升級，有 16:9 和 4:3 兩種版本
    [數小時的故事內容
  • 音頻，包括音樂和特效
  • 增強的角色動畫
    [圖庫和場景選擇
  • 《米埃爾》系列的另一部插曲作品，包含 40 多個 CG！

《License to Breed》是日本開發商 Miel 原創的視覺小說的本地化版本。我們 Cherry Kiss 的目標是為日本以外的玩家提供原汁原味的日本視覺小說體驗。

**請注意**
本遊戲中描述和直觀表現的所有角色均已年滿 18 周歲，在本遊戲的製作過程中沒有使用實際或可識別的未成年人。

data.short_description: 金錢、權力、名聲天羽家族擁有這一切......除了能延續家族姓氏的繼承人。因此家主下了最後一道命令： "凡是家族裡有生育能力的男人，必須馬上出去繁衍後代。在城裡的任何地方都可以，無一例外。"
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: License to Breed
data.detailed_description:
Story:

You would think that even just being a branch family member of the famous 'Amane Family' would come with some perks, but the only thing you have going for you is an infamous reputation for being a dirty little horn dog! For the past 6 months you've been stuck attending some boys-only boarding school as a punishment to reform you into a respectable member of society befitting the Amane family. You've only been allowed to return to your hometown because your grandfather, the patriarch of the Amane family, has passed away and his will is going to be discussed amongst your relatives.

Approaching your old home, after a less than warm welcome from the lovely ladies in town, stomach filled with butterflies, you are given a truly icy reception from the new de facto head of the Amane family, a woman named Maria, who simply hands you a phone and a ticket back to your hellhole of a boarding school saying your grandfather's will is stored on the phone so read it and get out. Shocked and confused you unlock the phone and read what is written on it: "Any fertile man in the Amane family must go out and breed at once! It shall be allowed any time, any place in the city. No exceptions." Before you can let that bombshell sink in, the secondary function of the phone activates!

*Click!*
[Accessing Amane Town network. Sending emergency alert to all citizens.]
*...*
[Every fertile female out there must comply with this message if they want to stay in town: Please prepare to have sex immediately. The man from the Amane family in possession of this phone is currently the most important person in town. His word is the law. This is not negotiable.]
*Ping~*

Holy Shit... Signatures from the town's biggest decision makers confirming this is a legitimate message accompany the broadcast, and just like that your life gets flipped, turned upside down and now, laid out before you on a silver platter is an all-you-can-fuck buffet with every pussy in town on the menu!


This self-absorbed gyaru has a rockin’ bod, and a rotten mouth, time to wash it out with… CUM?! This influencer wannabe is collecting a simp army with her perfect figure, untouchable in her slutty clothes, but you’ll change that soon enough and make her simp for you instead.


Petite and sweet idol Hotaru is on tour, and just so happens to be in town when it all goes down! She’s used to manipulating people under the guise of bashfulness. This won’t last long through your rule of rawdogging the whole town. It’s like she’s come to town solely to be your perfect plaything.


This martial arts chick has been giving you beat downs since childhood, taking it all on herself to teach you some discipline. Put her toned body to better use and get her to beat you off instead, and give her a spanking she won’t ever forget!


Ah, a woman dedicated to the gods. Strict and straight laced, she’s always been super nasty towards you. Her holier than thou attitude puts her at the top of your list for a pounding so divine that she’ll learn to worship a new god: your dick! Her fall from grace will be a long, sweaty, and messy one…


Hotaru’s manager Rei is a stuck up woman who grew up bullying protag kun, calling you a pig and humiliating you daily in front of others. But thanks to grandpa’s will the tables have turned, and you’re going to thoroughly enjoy personally spit roasting this slutty pig. Oink!


The confident and in control mayor of Amane Town, Maria is used to being the one in charge. This older lady thinks she can push you around, but with the revelation of your grandfather’s will, the dick down decree is in full swing, and it’s time to manhandle the top ma’am of this municipality.

Features:

  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Every fuckable girl is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • Another episodic entry in the Miel franchise with over 40 CGs!

License to Breed Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Money, power, fame! The Amane family has it all... Well, except heirs to continue on the family name. Thus the Amane Patriarch has one final command: "Any fertile man in the Amane family must go out and breed at once! It shall be allowed any place, any where in the city. No exceptions."
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
